data.title: BlackRock's Rick Rieder is a finalist for Fed Chair role after meeting with Trump, VP, and Treasury Sec.
data.description: BlackRock Inc executive Rick Rieder is a finalist for the Federal Reserve Chairman position, being interviewed by President Donald Trump, Vice President JD Vance, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, chief of staff Susie Wiles, and deputy chief of staff Dan Scavino. BlackRock has not yet commented on the news. Rieder discussed Federal Reserve profitability, monetary policy stability, and U.S. debt dynamics during the interview. Other contenders for the position include former Federal Reserve Governor Kevin Warsh and National Economic Council members. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: ADP Jobs Report beats expectations, complicating Fed outlook; S&P 500 stable. December rate cut uncertain.
data.description: There is uncertainty surrounding a potential rate cut in December. The ADP jobs report has exceeded expectations, creating ambiguity in the Federal Reserve's decision-making process. The S&P 500 remains stable amidst this news.

data.title: Schouw & Co. started a buy-back programme, aiming to purchase shares up to DKK 240 million in 2026.
data.description: Schouw & Co. commenced a share buy-back initiative on January 2, 2026, in accordance with their Company Announcement no. 59 issued on December 18, 2025. The programme allows Schouw & Co. to purchase shares amounting to a maximum of DKK 240 million within the timeframe of January 2 to December 31, 2026.

data.title: MediPharm Labs CEO David Pidduck stepping down, CFO Greg Hunter interim CEO.
data.description: MediPharm Labs has disclosed a change in leadership as CEO David Pidduck will be stepping down. The current CFO, Greg Hunter, has been selected to take over as interim CEO. This decision marks a significant transition for the company as it adjusts to new leadership. The change in management has sparked interest and raised questions about the future direction of the company among investors and industry analysts. The announcement has had an impact on the company's shares, causing a slight decline of X% in the stock price following the news. Shareholders are closely monitoring the situation as MediPharm Labs navigates through this period of transition.

data.title: China's ETF Connect program adds 14 ETFs from ChinaAMC, now offering access to 98 onshore ETFs for offshore investors.
data.description: ChinaAMC has expanded its range by adding 14 new ETFs, solidifying its position as the largest fund company with a total of 98 products. As of today, offshore investors can access these new onshore ETFs through the Stock Connect program. This move enables investors to diversify their portfolios and gain exposure to various new markets.

data.title: WHOOP partners with Scuderia Ferrari HP as Official Health and Fitness Wearable Partner. Team to host WHOOP logo in 2026 season.
data.description: In Boston, WHOOP, the human performance company, has revealed a significant partnership with Scuderia Ferrari HP on a global scale. Beginning in the 2026 season, WHOOP will serve as the Official Health and Fitness Wearable Partner and Team Partner of Scuderia Ferrari HP. As part of the collaboration, Scuderia Ferrari HP cars and drivers will showcase the WHOOP logo, and all team members will receive WHOOP devices to gain valuable insights into their health, recovery, and fitness levels. Moreover, this partnership will introduce an innovative integration with the team's medical support.

data.title: Read quotes from Danny Meyer, Naval Ravikant, and more on support, persistence, and focus. Source: Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Discover motivating quotes on the importance of forming a strong support network, cultivating perseverance, and prioritizing essential aspects of life. The publication "Investor's Business Daily" features an article showcasing inspirational remarks from prominent figures such as Danny Meyer and Naval Ravikant. Dive into words of wisdom that emphasize the power of relationships, determination, and staying aligned with one's priorities.
